/bin/bash -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
import os
import re
out = os.popen(\"ss -ltnp '( sport = :8080 )'\").read()
m = re.search(r'pid=(\\d+)', out)
if not m:
    raise SystemExit('no listener pid found')
with open('/home/user/workspace/pypi-server.pid', 'w') as f:
    f.write(m.group(1) + '\\n')
print(m.group(1))
PY"
